changelog: FIXED: OTA update prompt now appears even when the payment lock screen is showing (v1.44.67 trapped users on the broken paywall because the update check ran INSIDE the gate).
NEW: "Check for app update" button on the error panel — taps open the latest APK in your browser so you can manually re-install if something goes wrong.

NEW: real network error messages on the lock screen (DNS, SSL/clock, timeout, HTTP code) instead of the generic "Could not reach payment server". If anything fails, you and HushTV support can now see exactly what's wrong.
